sentiment_score_definition: x <= -0.35: Bearish; -0.35 < x <= -0.15: Somewhat-Bearish; -0.15 < x < 0.15: Neutral; 0.15 <= x < 0.35: Somewhat_Bullish; x >= 0.35: Bullish
relevance_score_definition: 0 < x <= 1, with a higher score indicating higher relevance.

feed.title: 5 Revealing Analyst Questions From KeyCorp's Q4 Earnings Call
feed.summary: KeyCorp’s Q4 results exceeded analyst expectations with double-digit revenue growth and strong expense management. Management highlighted organic growth in middle market lending, investment banking, and wealth management, along with improvements in asset quality and capital ratios. The article details five key questions posed by analysts during the earnings call, covering topics from strategic priorities and hiring timelines to acquisition appetite, return on tangible common equity, and commercial real estate prospects.

feed.title: MSCI to Consult on a Potential Reclassification of Greece to Developed Market status
feed.summary: MSCI Inc. has launched a consultation to potentially reclassify Greece from Emerging Market to Developed Market status, targeting implementation for the August 2026 Index Review. This decision follows Greece's progress in aligning with Developed Market accessibility standards and its economic development, with MSCI waiving the Size and Liquidity persistency rule based on feedback from international institutional investors. Market participants have until March 16, 2026, to provide feedback, with the final decision to be announced by March 31, 2026.

feed.title: Bernstein Sees Tougher Competitive Landscape Taking Shape for Verizon (VZ) and Peers
feed.summary: Bernstein forecasts a tougher competitive landscape for Verizon and its peers in 2026, stemming from increased pressure observed throughout 2025. The firm recently cut its price target on Verizon from $46 to $44, maintaining a Market Perform rating. Despite this, Verizon secured approval for its $20 billion acquisition of Frontier Communications, contingent on commitments to expand fiber internet and wireless coverage in California.

feed.title: Tech Giants Shift from NVIDIA as Company Expands AI Ecosystem
feed.summary: The article discusses a significant shift in the tech industry, where major technology companies are moving away from relying solely on NVIDIA. This change comes as NVIDIA simultaneously expands its own AI ecosystem, suggesting a competitive environment where former partners are becoming rivals or seeking alternative solutions.

feed.title: Gartner: Zero Trust Data Governance By 2028
feed.summary: Gartner predicts that by 2028, 50% of organizations will adopt a zero-trust posture for data governance due to the increasing volume of unverified AI-generated data. This shift is crucial to mitigate risks like "model collapse" and meet escalating compliance demands. Organizations are advised to appoint AI governance leaders, foster cross-functional collaboration, and leverage active metadata management to manage these risks effectively.

feed.title: Nucor finishes 2025 with 14 percent earnings decline
feed.summary: Nucor reported a 14 percent decline in net earnings for the full year 2025 compared to 2024, despite a 32 percent increase in fourth-quarter earnings year-over-year. The steelmaker anticipates increased earnings in the first quarter of 2026, driven by higher volumes and prices in its steel mills segment. CEO Leon Topalian expressed optimism for "robust demand" and the contributions from recently completed growth projects.

feed.title: Affera momentum continues as Medtronic announces CE Mark in Europe & US IDE first cases for Sphere-360 PFA catheter to treat paroxysmal atrial fibrillation
feed.summary: Medtronic announced two significant advancements for its Affera Sphere-360 catheter, designed to treat paroxysmal atrial fibrillation (AFib): it received CE Mark approval in Europe and completed its first cases in the Horizon 360 IDE pivotal trial in the United States. This all-in-one mapping and single-shot pulsed field ablation (PFA) catheter aims to offer a simplified workflow and predictable outcomes. The Sphere-360 catheter uniquely adapts to the pulmonary vein anatomy, delivering consistent lesions without rotation, enhancing efficiency for AFib patients.

feed.title: Assessing N-able (NABL) Valuation After B. Riley Securities Initiates Buy Coverage
feed.summary: B. Riley Securities recently initiated "Buy" coverage on N-able (NABL), a cloud software provider, drawing attention to its valuation. The stock, currently trading below analyst price targets, is considered undervalued by a most followed narrative, suggesting a fair value of $9.65 against its last close of $6.77. This assessment is driven by increased demand for N-able's cyber resilience platform due to cloud adoption and rising cyber threats, which is expected to fuel recurring revenue and improve net margins.

feed.title: Carole Huntsman Sells 910 Shares of Madrigal Pharmaceuticals (NASDAQ:MDGL) Stock
feed.summary: Madrigal Pharmaceuticals (NASDAQ:MDGL) insider Carole Huntsman sold 910 shares of the company's stock on January 26, 2026, for a total value of approximately $449,339.80. This transaction reduced her direct ownership in the company by 9.07%. The stock traded up 3.9% on the day of the sale, and analysts currently rate MDGL as a "Moderate Buy" with an average price target of $632.64.

feed.title: PVH names Gemma Hart chief communications officer
feed.summary: PVH Corp, parent company of Calvin Klein and Tommy Hilfiger, has appointed Gemma Hart as its new chief communications officer, effective February 9, 2026. Hart, with over two decades of experience in communications, will be responsible for all global internal and external communications strategies and will report directly to CEO Stefan Larsson. She succeeds Amber McCann, who is departing the organization.

feed.title: Keysight Introduces Megawatt EV Charging Test Systems
feed.summary: Keysight Technologies has launched two new EV charging test solutions designed to support high-power and megawatt-level charging for electric vehicles. These solutions aim to help manufacturers accelerate development, ensure reliability, and meet global standards for advanced charging infrastructure. The offerings include the SL2600A Megawatt Charging Discovery System for heavy-duty applications and the enhanced SL1047A Scienlab Charging Discovery System – High‑Power Series, both modular and scalable, supporting various international charging standards.

feed.title: Keysight Powers the Future of E-Mobility with Test Solutions for High-Power and Megawatt Charging
feed.summary: Keysight Technologies has released two new test solutions for electric vehicle (EV) charging, addressing the growing need for high-power and megawatt-level charging infrastructure. These solutions, the SL2600A Megawatt Charging Discovery System and the enhanced SL1047A Scienlab Charging Discovery System – High-Power Series, are designed to accelerate development, ensure reliability, and meet evolving global standards for EV charging. They provide flexible and scalable testing capabilities for both electric vehicles and charging stations, helping manufacturers reduce development risk and time-to-market.

feed.title: Chubb (CB) Projected to Post Quarterly Earnings on Tuesday
feed.summary: Chubb (CB) is projected to release its Q4 2025 earnings after market close on Tuesday, February 3rd, with analysts expecting $6.33 EPS and $11.1051 billion in revenue. The company recently paid a quarterly dividend of $0.97 per share, and insiders have sold shares totaling approximately $9.97 million over the last 90 days. Institutional investors collectively own 83.81% of the stock, while analysts maintain a "Moderate Buy" consensus rating with an average target price of $323.81.

feed.title: Paycom Software (NYSE:PAYC) Hits New 52-Week Low After Analyst Downgrade
feed.summary: Paycom Software (NYSE:PAYC) shares hit a new 52-week low after UBS Group downgraded its price target from $245 to $210. Multiple other analysts have also reduced their price objectives, leading to a consensus "Hold" rating and a target price of $209.64 according to MarketBeat. The company recently reported a slight EPS miss but revenue growth, and insiders have sold shares, while institutional investors have shown mixed activity.

feed.title: Mirum Pharmaceuticals (NASDAQ:MIRM) Reaches New 12-Month High After Analyst Upgrade
feed.summary: Mirum Pharmaceuticals (NASDAQ:MIRM) stock hit a new 52-week high after HC Wainwright raised its price target to $130 from $102, maintaining a buy rating. The company has a "Moderate Buy" consensus rating from analysts with an average price target of $104.92, despite recent insider selling totaling approximately $1.9 million. Institutional investors have increased their stakes, and the company recently outperformed earnings and revenue estimates.

feed.title: Goldman, Morgan Stanley’s South Africa Inflation Call Undercuts Central Bank
feed.summary: Goldman Sachs and Morgan Stanley suggest the South African Reserve Bank could lower its 2026 inflation forecast due to a stronger rand and lower oil prices. This comes as the central bank prepares for its first interest rate decision of the year. The banks' analysis indicates current economic conditions are more favorable than the central bank's previous assumptions for November.

feed.title: Kosmos Energy Extends Early Tender Deadline for Notes
feed.summary: Kosmos Energy announced an extension of its Early Tender Time and Withdrawal Deadline for its cash tender offer of up to $250 million aggregate principal amount of its 7.750% Senior Notes due 2027. The deadline has moved from January 26, 2026, to January 28, 2026, to provide noteholders more time to tender their securities and qualify for the total consideration. TipRanks' AI Analyst, Spark, rates KOS as Neutral due to weak financial performance, despite some positive earnings call highlights.

feed.title: NUAI SEC Filings - New Era Energy & Digital, Inc. 10-K, 10-Q, 8-K Forms
feed.summary: This page provides a comprehensive resource for New Era Energy & Digital (NUAI) SEC filings, including 10-K, 10-Q, and 8-K forms, detailing the company's transition towards AI and digital infrastructure. Recent filings highlight major events such as land acquisitions for AI data centers in Texas and New Mexico, financing updates, Nasdaq listing compliance, and the termination of a liquid helium sales agreement. The reported financial figures show increased cash and equity, despite ongoing net losses, indicating a strategic shift and strengthened balance sheet.

feed.title: Provident Financial Services expands stock buyback plan to 2.15% of outstanding stock
feed.summary: Provident Financial Services (PFS) has announced an expansion of its stock buyback plan. The board has authorized a new stock repurchase program, which will commence after the completion of the current program. Together, these programs will allow the company to repurchase shares amounting to 2.15% of its outstanding stock.

feed.title: TE Connectivity prices $750M senior notes offerings
feed.summary: TE Connectivity announced the pricing of two senior notes offerings totaling $750 million. The offerings include $300 million of 5.500% senior notes due 2029 and $450 million of 5.600% senior notes due 2034. The net proceeds are intended for general corporate purposes, including the repayment of outstanding commercial paper.

feed.title: A Look At Equinix (EQIX) Valuation After Fresh AI Data Center Deal And Upbeat Analyst Commentary
feed.summary: Equinix (EQIX) is gaining investor attention following a new AI-oriented data center deal and positive analyst commentary. The company's stock is trading approximately 19% below its latest price target and is estimated to be undervalued by 38% based on intrinsic value. This renewed focus is driven by rapid expansion of its interconnection services and optimistic long-term growth forecasts, though potential risks from substantial ongoing data center spending and hyperscale customer concentration remain.

feed.title: Enphase Energy Restructuring Weighed Against Valuation And Mixed Share Performance
feed.summary: Enphase Energy (NasdaqGM:ENPH) is undergoing a significant restructuring, cutting approximately 6% of its workforce and relocating functions to reduce costs in response to softening residential solar demand. The company's shares have shown mixed performance, with recent gains but substantial declines over the past one to five years. This strategic move aims to align its cost structure with current market conditions, though the stock is currently trading above its estimated fair value.

feed.title: (LSPD) Equity Trading Insights (LSPD:CA)
feed.summary: This article provides equity trading insights for Lightspeed Commerce Inc. Subordinate Voting Shares (LSPD:CA), including long-term trading plans with buy and short targets, and stop-loss levels. It also presents AI-generated ratings for LSPD:CA, showing a Neutral rating for Near and Long terms, and a Weak rating for Mid-term. The article encourages readers to check the timestamp and get real-time triggers.

feed.title: Proposed Rate Cap Tests Synchrony Financial Earnings Resilience And Valuation
feed.summary: A proposed 10% cap on credit card interest rates could significantly impact Synchrony Financial's business model, particularly its reliance on interest income from store and co-branded cards. Analysts anticipate potential earnings declines and challenges in managing bad loans if the cap is implemented, despite Synchrony's current valuation appearing favorable. The upcoming earnings report will be crucial for understanding management's strategy to address these regulatory changes.

feed.title: Regal Rexnord (RRX) Maintains Dividend Amid Earnings Miss
feed.summary: Regal Rexnord (RRX) has declared a consistent quarterly dividend of $0.35 per share, resulting in a 0.92% forward yield, despite a recent Q3 earnings miss causing a dip in share performance. The company aims for $900 million in free cash flow by 2026, focusing on expanding its data center operations. While demonstrating strong financial metrics and growth potential, an Altman Z-Score of 1.79 and insider selling trends suggest caution for investors.

feed.title: First BanCorp Dividend Hike Highlights Undervalued Share Price And Income Appeal
feed.summary: First BanCorp (NYSE: FBP) has increased its quarterly cash dividend by 11%, signaling a focus on returning cash to shareholders and highlighting its financial position. This move is significant for income-focused investors, as Simply Wall St assesses the stock as undervalued and trading below analyst targets. Key considerations include the dividend payout ratio and analyst expectations of a slight earnings decline over the next three years.

feed.title: Northeast Bank Reports Quarterly Net Income of $20.7 Million and Strong Loan Volume Growth
feed.summary: Northeast Bank reported a net income of $20.7 million for the quarter ending December 31, 2025, which was a decrease from the prior year's same quarter, but its net income for the six months ending December 31, 2025, increased to $43.3 million. The bank experienced significant loan growth, with its total loan portfolio reaching $4.35 billion, a 15.8% increase since June 30, 2025, and overall assets growing to $4.95 billion. Despite a quarterly dip in net income, strong loan activity and effective strategic management position the bank for optimistic future growth in net interest income.

feed.title: Endeavor blockchain buys Mawson infrastructure (MIGI) shares
feed.summary: Endeavor Blockchain, LLC, along with Joshua Allen Kilgore, PM Squared LLC, and Cody Smith, purchased 60,000 common shares of Mawson Infrastructure Group Inc. (MIGI) for $290,400. This insider transaction follows a 30% decline in Mawson's revenue for October 2025 and ongoing efforts to stabilize its financial and market position through measures like a reverse stock split.

feed.title: Four Corners Property Trust Acquires McAlister's Deli
feed.summary: Four Corners Property Trust (FCPT) has acquired a newly constructed McAlister's Deli property in Michigan for $2.3 million, marking another step in its strategy to expand its portfolio of restaurant and retail properties. The acquisition is structured under a long-term net lease with a franchisee, aiming to provide stable cash flow. Wall Street analysts currently forecast a price target of $29.75 for FCPT over the next 12 months, though recent analyst ratings have seen price target downgrades.

feed.title: Gartner Predicts by 2028, 50% Of Organizations Will Adopt Zero-Trust Data Governance as Unverified AI-Generated Data Grows
feed.summary: Gartner predicts that by 2028, 50% of organizations will adopt a zero-trust data governance approach due to the increasing volume of unverified AI-generated data. This shift is crucial to safeguard business outcomes and mitigate risks like "model collapse" where AI tools generate inaccurate information. Organizations are advised to appoint AI governance leaders, foster cross-functional collaboration, leverage existing governance policies, and adopt active metadata practices to manage these risks and ensure data integrity.

feed.title: Hyatt Regency Vilamoura Algarve Opens, Bringing Contemporary Hospitality to the Algarve Coast
feed.summary: Hyatt Hotels Corporation has opened the Hyatt Regency Vilamoura Algarve, rebranding the former Dom Pedro Vilamoura. The hotel, managed by DETAILS – Hospitality, Sports, Leisure, offers 257 guestrooms and 21 suites, along with a range of dining options including Brasa Coastal Steakhouse. It features extensive meeting spaces, sports and wellness amenities, and a Kids Club, catering to diverse travelers in the prestigious Vilamoura resort town.

feed.title: Starbucks CEO Brian Niccol’s compensation falls 68% to $31 million in 2025
feed.summary: Starbucks CEO Brian Niccol's total compensation dropped by 68% to $31 million in 2025, a year after receiving a large pay package for his move from Chipotle. Despite the reduction from $96 million in 2024, his 2025 compensation included a $5 million bonus and nearly $20 million in stock awards. Niccol, who took charge in September 2024, has been implementing a "Back to Starbucks" turnaround strategy, which is showing early signs of progress as the company prepares to report its fourth-quarter earnings.

feed.title: Starbucks CEO Brian Niccol’s compensation falls 68% to $31 million in 2025
feed.summary: Starbucks CEO Brian Niccol's total compensation dropped by 68% to $31 million in 2025, a significant decrease from his $96 million package in 2024, which prominently included large stock awards. Niccol, who became CEO in September 2024, has been implementing a "Back to Starbucks" turnaround strategy focusing on menu simplification, improved service, and store ambiance, with early signs of progress in the global coffee chain.

feed.title: Ocugen Secures Funding to Advance Gene Therapy Pipeline
feed.summary: Ocugen, Inc. has raised $22.5 million through an equity offering to fund its gene therapy pipeline and extend its operational runway through 2026. This capital injection follows positive interim 12-month data from its Phase 2 ArMaDa clinical trial for OCU410, a gene therapy candidate for geographic atrophy, with a Biologics License Application submission targeted for 2028. The company is also advancing OCU410ST for Stargardt disease, aiming to complete patient recruitment in Q1 2026.

feed.title: Is It Time To Reassess DTE Energy (DTE) After Steady Multi‑Year Share Gains?
feed.summary: This article analyzes DTE Energy (DTE) using two valuation methods: the Dividend Discount Model (DDM) and the Price-to-Earnings (P/E) ratio. The DDM suggests DTE is slightly undervalued by 2.9%, while the P/E ratio, compared to its proprietary "Fair Ratio," indicates the shares are modestly undervalued. The analysis concludes that DTE Energy appears to be fairly valued to modestly undervalued based on these models.

feed.title: Big Pharma Tight-Lipped on Details of API Stockpile Deals
feed.summary: Bristol Myers Squibb, GSK, and Merck are contributing active pharmaceutical ingredients (APIs) to the Strategic Active Pharmaceutical Ingredients Reserve (SAPIR) as part of deals with the White House, aimed at mitigating drug shortages and reducing reliance on foreign nations. However, many specific terms of these agreements, including manufacturing locations and donation schedules, remain private. The secrecy raises questions about the commonality of such donations compared to standard company inventory practices and the transparency of the administration's initiative.

feed.title: The Top 10 Brands on Ulta.com in 2025
feed.summary: The article highlights the top 10 beauty brands by online sales share on Ulta.com in 2025, with science-based skincare brands like Clinique and La Roche-Posay leading the list. Data from Navigo Marketing indicates Clinique secured 3.3% and La Roche-Posay 2.5% of online sales. The ranking also includes brands like Sol de Janeiro, Tarte Cosmetics, and OPI, showcasing diversity across skincare, makeup, nail, and body care categories.

feed.title: Is the diddy Honda Super-N a hit or a miss? Have your say
feed.summary: TopGear.com discusses the new Honda Super-N, a kei car-inspired econobox that aims to bring joy to British roads. Reviewers Ollie Kew and Greg Potts offer contrasting opinions on the car's design and market potential. While Kew praises its spaciousness and fun-to-drive nature, Potts criticizes its boxy aesthetics compared to other stylish small cars.

feed.title: General Motors is set to report earnings before the bell. Here's what Wall Street expects amid major electric vehicle write-downs
feed.summary: General Motors is preparing to announce its fourth-quarter and full-year earnings, with analysts anticipating adjusted earnings per share of $2.20 and revenue of $45.8 billion. The company is expected to report significant special charges totaling $7.1 billion related to its electric vehicle strategy adjustments and restructuring efforts in China. Investors will also be closely watching GM's guidance for 2026, as CEO Mary Barra has indicated it will be a stronger year than 2025.

feed.title: Peoples Bancorp Of North Carolina (PEBK) Margin Gain And 21.3% Earnings Growth Reinforce Bullish Narratives
feed.summary: Peoples Bancorp of North Carolina (PEBK) reported strong FY 2025 results, with Q4 revenue of US$24.6 million and EPS of US$1.25, contributing to 21.3% earnings growth over the last year. The company's net profit margin increased to 22.3% from 19.9%, indicating improved efficiency. Despite positive recent performance and a P/E ratio of 9.6x, below the industry average, the article notes quarterly profit swings and an unstable dividend history as potential concerns for investors.

feed.title: Mountain Lake Acquisition Corp. II Prices Its Upsized IPO Of 31,320,000 Units At An Offering Price Of $10.00 Per Unit
feed.summary: Mountain Lake Acquisition Corp. II has priced its upsized initial public offering (IPO) of 31.3 million units. Each unit is offered at a price of $10.00. This news was reported by Refinitiv.

feed.title: Genmab pauses enrollment in early ADC trial acquired from ProfoundBio
feed.summary: Genmab has halted enrollment in an early-stage clinical trial for GEN1286, an experimental cancer drug acquired from ProfoundBio. This decision reflects a broader refinement of its oncology pipeline, prioritizing more advanced candidates. Despite setbacks with early-stage ADCs and a bispecific antibody, Genmab continues to advance rinatabart sesutecan, a late-stage ADC from the ProfoundBio deal, into Phase 3 for gynecological cancers.

feed.title: Expedia laying off 10% of its technology team
feed.summary: Expedia is cutting 10% of its technology team, a move confirmed by an Expedia spokesperson who stated the company is reducing organizational layers and hiring new roles. The travel company had approximately 3,300 employees in the Seattle area at the end of 2024. This action is part of broader organizational changes within the company.

feed.title: Is Alexandria Real Estate Equities (ARE) Pricing Reflecting Recent Share Price Swings?
feed.summary: Alexandria Real Estate Equities (ARE) has seen significant share price fluctuations, with recent gains but substantial long-term declines. Despite this, Simply Wall St's valuation model suggests the stock is undervalued by 34.5% based on a Discounted Cash Flow analysis, implying an intrinsic value of $87.20 per share against a current price of $57.16. The company also trades at a P/S ratio of 3.23x, which is below both its industry average and Simply Wall St's Fair Ratio of 4.00x, further indicating undervaluation.

feed.title: Heritage Financial EVP Wilson sells $50k in stock By Investing.com
feed.summary: Kelli Ann Wilson, EVP Chief Banking Officer at Heritage Financial Corp, sold 1,900 shares of common stock for over $50,000 on January 26, 2026. This transaction leaves Wilson with 3,778 directly owned shares. The sale follows Heritage Financial's strong Q4 2025 earnings which surpassed market expectations, leading several analysts to raise their price targets for the company.

feed.title: Citigroup hit with lawsuit alleging ‘weaponized’ HR, hostile culture at wealth unit
feed.summary: A former senior wealth-management executive, Julia Carreon, is suing Citigroup, alleging she was forced out after experiencing persistent sexual harassment from wealth chief Andy Sieg and a biased internal investigation. Carreon claims Citigroup maintains a "discriminatory and sexually harassing culture" and that its HR department was "weaponized" against her rather than addressing the alleged misconduct. Citigroup has stated the lawsuit has "absolutely no merit."

feed.title: Bullish block trade of KINGSOFT CLOUD(03896) 934K shares at $7.3, $6.818M turnover
feed.summary: A significant bullish block trade involving 934,000 shares of KINGSOFT CLOUD (03896) occurred at a price of HK$7.3, resulting in a turnover of HK$6.818 million. The company's last reported price was up by 5.959%, with its highest price for the day reaching HK$7.36. This block trade indicates strong investor interest and positive sentiment for KINGSOFT CLOUD.

feed.title: Why Merit Medical (MMSI) is Poised to Beat Earnings Estimates Again
feed.summary: Merit Medical (MMSI) is anticipated to beat its upcoming earnings estimates, continuing a strong trend from previous reports. The company has a history of exceeding earnings expectations, with an average surprise of 14.82% over the last two quarters. This positive outlook is further supported by the stock's positive Zacks Earnings ESP and a Zacks Rank #2 (Buy), indicating a high probability of another earnings beat.

feed.title: Mitsubishi UFJ Exits Substantial Holder Position in Breville Group
feed.summary: Mitsubishi UFJ Financial Group has announced that it is no longer a substantial shareholder in Breville Group Limited, as its voting interest has dropped below the regulatory disclosure threshold. This change resulted from a series of small transactions in Breville shares by a Morgan Stanley-controlled entity. Despite this shift in the institutional shareholder base, the development is not expected to directly impact Breville's operations or strategy.

feed.title: Lands’ End and WHP Global announce joint venture
feed.summary: Lands’ End and WHP Global have formed a joint venture to unlock the value of the Lands’ End brand's intellectual property and strengthen the apparel company's balance sheet. WHP Global will pay $300 million for a 50 percent controlling stake in a newly created venture housing all intellectual property, with Lands’ End retaining the other 50 percent. The deal aims for Lands’ End to repay its outstanding term loan and for WHP Global to lead global licensing and brand expansion, while Lands’ End maintains operational control of its core business.
